history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image is a dark, purple-toned game or app “level up” screen showing a progress panel with experience and level statistics.

Main Subject:
A centered rectangular UI panel labeled “LEVEL UP!” contains a circular profile image on the left, a level indicator, an experience progress bar, and three small statistic boxes showing Messages, XP Needed, and Next Lvl.

Setting:
The scene appears to be a digital interface on a dark background with a subtle gradient. No real-world setting is shown, and lighting is purely graphic, with glowing accents in purple, teal, and gold.

Visual Details:
At the top of the screen, the text “LEVEL UP!” is displayed in gold with small diamond-like shapes on either side. The main panel has rounded corners, a dark navy interior, and a faint border. On the left inside the panel is a circular image with a purple ring; the image shows an outdoor sunset/sunrise sky with orange and pink clouds and silhouetted rooftops or trees. Near the top center of the panel is “~We~” in large white text, with a small rounded badge containing “#321” in yellow/orange. Below that, “LEVEL PROGRESS” appears in smaller text. Two large rounded rectangles sit side by side: the left one reads “LEVEL 2” in white, and the right one reads “EXPERIENCE 18 / 150” with “18 / 150” in bright cyan/teal. Under these, a horizontal progress bar shows a purple/pink fill on the left and a darker remainder to the right, with “12%” displayed at the right end. At the lower part of the panel, three smaller rounded boxes show “MESSAGES 9,” “XP NEEDED 132,” and “NEXT LVL 3.” Near the very bottom center of the panel is faint grey text that is difficult to read clearly; it appears to say a congratulations message.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
~We~
#321
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
2
EXPERIENCE
18 / 150
12%
MESSAGES
9
XP NEEDED
132
NEXT LVL
3
No other clearly readable text detected; faint bottom text is unclear.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a game-style “Level Up” interface with a profile circle, current level, experience progress, and additional stats. A progress bar indicates 12% completion, and the panel presents messages, remaining XP, and the next level value.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
